response.overview: A group of immigrants embarks on a dangerous journey in search of the long-awaited American Dream, hoping to build a better future for their families. However, after crossing the border, they soon discover that the greatest danger is not the desert itself, but the corruption, injustice, and abuse inflicted by those who exploit their desperation.  As they struggle to survive and remain united, each of them is forced to make difficult choices that will test their courage, their values, and the true meaning of freedom. Through betrayal, sacrifice, and moments of intense suspense, they come to realize that the price of pursuing a new life can be far greater than they ever imagined.  *American Nightmare* is a powerful action drama that portrays the harsh reality of illegal immigration, revealing the darkest side of a system shaped by corruption, fear, and the constant fight for survival.
response.title: Pesadilla Americana
